body:
🔴 **Tool Issue** — `CHANGELOG.md:3`

The entry says `Compared with version 3.3.0`, but version `4.0.0-beta.1` was released previously (see the entry dated 2024-07-25 below). The changelog should compare against the most recent beta release `4.0.0-beta.1`, not the last stable `3.3.0`, to accurately reflect incremental changes for users upgrading from the previous beta.

**Fix:** Update the comparison to reference `4.0.0-beta.1` (the prior release in this major series) and report this in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues) if it is a tooling bug.

1 tool issue found in this TypeSpec migration PR for `@azure/arm-search@4.0.0-beta.2`.

The `CHANGELOG.md` compares with `3.3.0` (stable) instead of `4.0.0-beta.1` (the most recent release in the 4.x beta series). All other checks pass: version consistency across `package.json`, `CHANGELOG.md`, and `searchManagementContext.ts` is correct (`4.0.0-beta.2`); no alpha versions; `KnownVersions` correctly includes both the stable `2025-05-01` and the new preview `2026-03-01-preview` API versions; breaking changes are documented; no naming anomalies; no type safety issues; constructor overloads maintain backward compatibility with `subscriptionId`.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":37881,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/search/arm-search/CHANGELOG.md","line":3,"issueType":"tool","category":"changelog-comparison","description":"CHANGELOG compares 4.0.0-beta.2 with 3.3.0 (stable) instead of the prior beta 4.0.0-beta.1, skipping incremental changes since the last beta release."}]}
```

</details>

## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

- ❌ **Merge conflict**: The PR has conflicts in multiple files beyond `pnpm-lock.yaml` — specifically `sdk/search/arm-search/package.json` and `sdk/search/arm-search/src/searchManagementClient.ts`. Auto-resolution is not possible. **Action:** Please rebase this branch onto `main` manually and resolve all conflicts, then follow the [pnpm-lock conflict guide](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/blob/main/documentation/resolve-pnpm-lock-merge-conflict.md) to regenerate `pnpm-lock.yaml`.

<!-- mgmt-review -->
